name: Boot-Up Corporal - Command Dynamo
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>長</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>コマンドリボルバー
desc: You can target up to 2 Machine "Gadget" monsters you control or in your GY with different names; Special Summon this card from your hand, then equip those targets to this card (regardless of their Type). You can only use this effect of "Boot-Up Corporal - Command Dynamo" once per turn. Gains 1000 ATK for each monster equipped to this card by this effect.
mnst_eff: You can target up to 2 Machine "Gadget" monsters you control or in your GY with different names; Special Summon this card from your hand, then equip those targets to this card (regardless of their Type). You can only use this effect of "Boot-Up Corporal - Command Dynamo" once per turn. Gains 1000 ATK for each monster equipped to this card by this effect.
eff: You can target up to 2 Machine "Gadget" monsters you control or in your GY with different names; Special Summon this card from your hand, then equip those targets to this card (regardless of their Type). You can only use this effect of "Boot-Up Corporal - Command Dynamo" once per turn. Gains 1000 ATK for each monster equipped to this card by this effect.

action: Equips monsters from the player's field to itself
Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard to itself
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
